APPEAL JUSTIFICATION (BE-1-4):
PREAUTHORIZATION APPEAL: The service was provided without prior authorization due to clinical urgency / administrative oversight. We hereby submit a retroactive preauthorization request with full clinical justification as required under ART PreAuth Protocol Section: General Requirements. All supporting clinical documentation is attached.
Supporting Documents: Medical report, clinical notes, diagnosis confirmation, treatment plan

  Code CV-1-3: CV-1-3

    • 25/02/2026 | 142808 – GLUCOMETER TEST ONE TOUCH
    • 25/02/2026 | B01512 – TROPONIN I ADV.

APPEAL JUSTIFICATION (CV-1-3):
COVERAGE VERIFICATION APPEAL: We are appealing the coverage determination and requesting re-adjudication based on the attached policy benefit schedule. If the primary diagnosis is excluded, we request consideration of the secondary covered diagnosis as documented in the clinical notes.
Supporting Documents: Policy benefit schedule, clinical documentation for alternate diagnosis

FINANCIAL SUMMARY:
  Total Claimed: SAR 7,300.98
  Lines Rejected: 6
